messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0161",
  "title": "模拟",
  "page_index": 1,
  "page_range": "1"
}

Section text:
## 模拟

王者荣耀

第五人格

PUBG MOBILE

荒野行动

浪漫餐厅

麦吉大改造

恋与深空

偶像梦幻祭

message.content: This section can answer questions about which video game entities are listed under the "模拟" (Simulation) topic. It specifically identifies the following titles: 王者荣耀, 第五人格, PUBG MOBILE, 荒野行动, 浪漫餐厅, 麦吉大改造, 恋与深空, and 偶像梦幻祭. The section does not contain dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types.
